name: 樱桥通派出所
atmosphere: 慵懒怀旧，阳光照在空椅子上，淡淡的烟味和猫粮味

sensory.sight: 简单木桌、泛黄旧照片、地区地图、窗边椅子和窗台上的猫粮袋
sensory.sound: 街上的声音隔着窗传进来，偶尔有猫在门口叫
sensory.smell: 罐装咖啡、旧文件、猫粮和一点淡淡烟味
sensory.touch: 桌面有旧木头触感，窗边椅子被太阳晒得温暖

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view of a small Japanese neighborhood police box (koban). Slightly weathered white building with a old bicycle parked outside. Cat food bowls lined up near the door. A faded area map visible through the window. Warm afternoon sunlight casting shadows. Under a traditional shopping arcade at the end of the street. Studio Ghibli background art style, quiet slightly melancholic atmosphere.
exterior.negative: modern police station, guns, serious, intimidating, 3D, photorealistic

interior.prompt: 2D interior of a small Japanese police box. Simple wooden desk with an old photograph frame — two people in the photo. A chair by the window with the best sunlight, overlooking the street. Filing cabinet in the corner. Windowsill with cat food bags and bowls. Faded district map on the wall. A coffee cup on the desk. Warm afternoon light through window, dust motes floating. Studio Ghibli background art style, quiet lonely atmosphere.
interior.negative: modern office, computers, bright lights, busy, 3D, photorealistic

spots.desk: 九条的桌子——文件不多，一张泛黄的旧照片，上面有两个人
spots.window_chair: 窗边椅子——阳光最好的位置，能看见整条街
spots.bench_outside: 门外长椅——邻居歇脚的地方，猫也在这里等九条
spots.doorway: 门口——门把手磨得发亮，猫碗总是满的

conversation_hooks: 旧照片不要随便追问，除非关系足够近
坐这里能看街上人来人往

time_atmosphere.morning: 九条来得不太早，咖啡还冒热气人已经出去了
time_atmosphere.noon: 最像在运作的时候，但九条在发呆
time_atmosphere.evening: 夕阳把整间屋子染成橙色，九条可能又去公园了
time_atmosphere.night: 深夜只剩一盏灯，九条偶尔抽烟看窗外
